text_raw: I'll freeze you to the bone!
text_clean: I'll freeze you to the bone!

text_raw: How many fools like you do you think I've crushed?
text_clean: How many fools like you do you think I've crushed?

text_raw: You dare lay a filthy hand on a sovereign such as I?
text_clean: You dare lay a filthy hand on a sovereign such as I?

text_raw: Your screams will echo through this ice for eternity.
text_clean: Your screams will echo through this ice for eternity.

text_raw: Struggle and sink deeper into despair!
text_clean: Struggle and sink deeper into despair!

text_raw: Feel it! Terror that cuts to the bone!
text_clean: Feel it! Terror that cuts to the bone!
